arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola blames the FA Cup BALL for Man City's striking woes against Plymouth despite win - echoing Mikel Arteta's frustrations this season
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT: Pep Guardiola hit out at the FA Cup ball and suggested that it is not fit for purpose following Manchester City's come-from-behind win against Championship side Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'complete summer signing' as Arsenal handed Nico Williams hope: FootballTransfers recap
arts.sum: Chelsea 'complete summer signing' as Arsenal handed Nico Williams hope: FootballTransfers recap Sunday 3 March saw Chelsea 'complete' the signing of a Brazilian wonderkid and Arsenal given hope in their pursuit of Nico Williams.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have third summer transfer decided as Mikel Arteta masterplan moves closer
arts.sum: But a further twist has emerged, Sky in Germany have now reported that Joshua Kimmich's representatives have already held talks with the Gunners over a switch in the summer. Meanwhile, The Mirror reports Sesko 'remains the top target' ahead of the summer and that he could be available for £55m.

arts.ttl: Man Utd target ambitious Arsenal HIJACK amid Osimhen worry
arts.sum: Manchester United are hoping to hijack Arsenal ’s move for Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi this summer, according to reports. The Spain international is widely expected to join Mikel Arteta’s side once the 2024-25 campaign draws to a close, although Real Madrid are also interested in completing a deal for the 26-year-old.

arts.ttl: PSV v Arsenal | Champions League Preview Podcast
arts.sum: Football-Oranje’s Michael Statham speaks with Tom Canton from The Gooner Talk YouTube channel to preview PSV’s Champions League last 16 tie with Arsenal. To watch the match preview on YouTube, click here, or press play below: The post PSV v Arsenal | Champions League Preview Podcast appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Arsenal CLOSE to Nico Williams as bargain bid prepared
arts.sum: Barcelona were expected to rival Arsenal for the potential signing of Williams, but they have turned their attention to completing a surprise deal for Gabriel Martinelli, according to Fichajes . Arsenal ’s pursuit of Athletic Club winger Nico Williams has taken a surprise turn amid reports that Barcelona may have ended their interest in the Spain international.
